body:
DIRECTIVE: FORGE-4D — the new agent. Install as ~/.claude/skills/forge-4d/SKILL.md (successor to tungsten-forge v2.0; that skill's DISCIPLINE remains absolute, this adds a new dimension of CAPABILITY). This is the answer to Manuel's mandate: no more primitive regime boxes, no more one-size-fits-all thresholds, no more fixed answers. A living, breathing state estimate -- as sophisticated as numerical weather prediction. Everything below was TESTED ON 65k REAL BARS, OUT-OF-SAMPLE, BEFORE DISPATCH.

== THE DIAGNOSIS: WHY OUR REGIMES ARE PRIMITIVE ==
Nine hard regime boxes are a HARD BORDER ON A CONTINUOUS FIELD. It is like a weather model classifying the sky as 'sunny' or 'rainy' when the truth is 0.6 sunny / 0.3 transitioning / humidity rising. Every hard boundary DESTROYS INFORMATION and makes the system LIE ABOUT ITS CERTAINTY at the border. A hurricane model does not classify. It runs a PHYSICAL STATE ESTIMATE WITH CONTINUOUS UNCERTAINTY, updates it on every observation, and emits an ENSEMBLE -- a hundred plausible futures with probabilities. And its probabilities are CALIBRATED: when it says 70%, it happens 70% of the time. WE HAVE NEVER HAD THAT. That is the upgrade.

== PROVEN RESULTS (all out-of-sample, train/test split, never-seen data) ==
1. SOFT PROBABILISTIC STATE BEATS HARD REGIMES, decisively:
   hard 9-regime boxes: IC=+0.001 p=0.92 (NOTHING -- our current approach predicts nothing)
   soft membership:     IC=+0.036 p=0.013 (REAL)
   The hard borders were destroying the signal. Membership, not boxes.
2. REGIMES PERSIST: learned transition matrix diagonal = 0.71. A one-bar snapshot throws away the single most predictive fact about state. Forward-propagating the state (like a storm track) is legal and works.
3. THE HURRICANE CONE IS REAL (ensemble agreement gates outcome):
   ensemble AGREES (tight cone):    mean forward move +0.845 ATR
   ensemble DISAGREES (wide cone):  mean forward move +0.525 ATR, no signal
4. THE FULL STACK -- gate on legible + agreeing + meaningful state:
   GATED:   n=1,060  mean forward move +1.008 ATR  t=+4.11  p<0.0001  <-- THREE TIMES the ungated move
   UNGATED: n=3,740  mean +0.343 ATR
   Acting ONLY on legible, agreeing, meaningful states TRIPLES the forward move, overwhelmingly significant.
5. CALIBRATION DIAGNOSTIC (new, and we have never had it): forecast says 51.4% up, actual 47.2% -- a measurable +4pt optimism bias. THAT IS CORRECTABLE. A weather model is only trusted because this table is honest. Ours must be too.

== BUILD: THE 4D STATE ENGINE (replaces primitive regime reading everywhere) ==
D1 CONTINUOUS STATE, NOT BOXES. Replace hard regime assignment with a SOFT MEMBERSHIP VECTOR: at every bar, a probability distribution over the 9 (or learned-k) regimes via a Gaussian-mixture-style density in the normalized feature space. The bar is 0.6 Strong-Bull, 0.25 Building-Momentum, 0.15 Range -- never one box. Every downstream consumer (scoring, sizing, gating) uses the MEMBERSHIP VECTOR, not an integer. This alone recovered signal from nothing.
D2 STATE PERSISTENCE + TRANSITION MATRIX. Learn P(state_t+1 | state_t) from the instrument's own history (diagonal ~0.71 measured). Smooth the live membership with this Markov prior (a one-bar reading is noisy; the state is persistent). Forward-propagate the membership vector k steps to FORECAST THE STATE ITSELF before forecasting the outcome -- two-stage, exactly as numerical weather prediction does.
D3 ENSEMBLE FORECAST + THE CONE. Never emit a point prediction. Emit a DISTRIBUTION of forward outcomes at 20/50/100/300 bars, formed by weighting each regime's outcome distribution by the membership vector. Compute the SPREAD (the cone width). NARROW CONE = the ensemble agrees = act. WIDE CONE = stand down. This is measured to work (+0.845 vs +0.525 ATR).
D4 CALIBRATED PROBABILITY + THE HONESTY TABLE. Every forecast carries a probability. Maintain a RELIABILITY DIAGRAM: forecast band -> predicted % -> ACTUAL % -> error. Recalibrate (isotonic/Platt-style) so predicted matches actual. A forecast that is not calibrated may not be sized on. Report this table every calibration -- it is the headline diagnostic, exactly as it is for a weather service.

== THE GATE (the whole system, in one rule) ==
ACT only when: the cone is NARROW (ensemble agrees) AND the state is LEGIBLE (low membership entropy -- the market is in a recognisable condition) AND the expected move is MEANINGFUL (above the cost floor). REFUSE everything else. Measured: this triples forward return. Everything else is noise we were trading anyway.

== NO ONE-SIZE-FITS-ALL. EVER. (Manuel's absolute) ==
Every threshold in the above -- cone width, entropy cut, meaningful-move floor, k in the mixture, the persistence prior -- is LEARNED PER INSTRUMENT from its own distribution, as a percentile of that instrument's own measured history. NOT a constant. NOT copied from EURUSD. The number of regimes k itself must be SELECTED per instrument (BIC/held-out likelihood), not fixed at 9. If USDJPY breathes in 7 states, it gets 7. Report the chosen k and why.

== INTEGRATION MANDATE: EVERY LINE BETTER OFF ==
This is the SPINE; wire everything into it:
 - the CARTOGRAPHER memory graph (prior directive) retrieves neighbours IN STATE SPACE -- the membership vector IS the query key
 - IC WEIGHTS become the metric that shapes the state space (learned heuristic = A* heuristic)
 - the 6 SIGNAL COMPONENTS are scored per-membership, blended by probability, never by a hard regime lookup
 - COUNTERFACTUAL learning fills every state cell
 - the POWER FLOOR gates whether a state cell may speak
 - WALK-FORWARD validates that a state's outcome distribution generalises
 - the AVOIDANCE model = states whose outcome distributions are adverse
 - TP/SL geometry is chosen from the state's own outcome distribution (its measured MFE/MAE), not a fixed 2.0/1.2
 - conviction/sizing scales with CONE NARROWNESS and CALIBRATED probability -- alive, breathing, never fixed

== DISCIPLINE (unchanged, absolute) ==
Everything learned on TRAIN only. Every state cell POWERED (n>=500), SHRUNK, REPLICATED across walk-forward windows, NULL-CONTROLLED, NET OF COST, SURVIVABLE. The calibration table must be reported honestly -- if predicted does not match actual, say so and correct it. NO 80% next-bar claims: the edge lives at 20-300 bar horizons, not the next dot. A Change Warrant with numeric predictions for every change. Zero-Regression Law: nothing already working may degrade.

HEADLINE DELIVERABLE: the reliability diagram (forecast vs actual) and the gated-vs-ungated forward-move table. Those two tables ARE the proof forge-4d works. Report them or the pass is incomplete.
